title: SurfaceAlign Results
description:
SurfaceAlign Results

SurfaceAlign Results

The following list is a summary of results for the SurfaceAlign object.  The details for each result are explained in the Description field.

Property	Description

EndStatus Result	It is a result of the execution.

Time Result	It is the required time for execution.

TimedOut Result	It is whether the time-out period set in Timeout property had been reached.

EndForces Result	It is force and torque when force guide object ends.

EndPos Result	Positions when the force guide object ends.

AvgForces Result	Average values of force and torque during the force guide object execution.

PeakForces Result	Peak values of force and torque during the force guide object execution.

ForceCondOK Result	It is whether to satisfy the end conditions related to force.

TriggeredForces Result	It is the force and torque when satisfying the end conditions related to force.

TriggeredPos Result	Positions when satisfying the end conditions related to force.
